stemHtml: When flying a holding pattern with the outbound leg length based on DME distance, the outbound leg terminates…

options.a: 0.5 NM prior to reaching the limiting DME distance.
options.b: as soon as the limiting DME distance is reached.
options.c: 1 NM prior to reaching the limiting DME distance.
options.d: half a minute prior to reaching the limiting DME distance.
